   128→    private func loadCurrentUserId() async {
   129→        guard let authRepo = authRepository else { return }
   130→        currentUserId = (try? await authRepo.currentUser()?.id) ?? ""
   131→    }
   132→
   133→    func onDisappear() {
   134→        observationTask?.cancel()
   135→        workoutsObservationTask?.cancel()
   136→    }
   137→
   138→    // MARK: - Feature Flag
   139→
   140→    private func checkFeatureFlag() async {
   141→        guard let checker = featureFlagChecker else {
   142→            isFeatureEnabled = false
   143→            return
   144→        }
   145→        isFeatureEnabled = await checker.isFeatureEnabled(.personalTrainerEnabled)
   146→        isChatEnabled = await checker.isFeatureEnabled(.trainerChatEnabled)

   148→
   149→    // MARK: - Load Current Trainer
   150→
   151→    func loadCurrentTrainer() async {
   152→        guard let useCase = getCurrentTrainerUseCase else {
   153→            #if DEBUG
   154→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] GetCurrentTrainerUseCase not available")
   155→            #endif
   156→            return
   157→        }
   158→
   159→        isLoading = true
   160→        error = nil
   161→
   162→        do {
   163→            if let result = try await useCase.execute() {
   164→                currentTrainer = result.trainer
   165→                connectionStatus = result.relationship.status
   166→                relationshipId = result.relationship.id
   167→                await loadAssignedWorkouts()
   168→            } else {
   169→                currentTrainer = nil
   170→                connectionStatus = nil
   171→                relationshipId = nil
   172→                assignedWorkouts = []
   173→            }
   174→        } catch {
   175→            self.error = error
   176→            #if DEBUG
   177→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Error loading trainer: \(error)")
   178→            #endif
   179→        }
   180→
   181→        isLoading = false
   182→    }
   183→
   184→    // MARK: - Search Trainers
   185→
   186→    func searchTrainers() async {
   187→        guard let useCase = discoverTrainersUseCase else {
   188→            #if DEBUG
   189→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] DiscoverTrainersUseCase not available")
   190→            #endif
   191→            return
   192→        }
   193→
   194→        let query = searchQuery.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
   195→
   196→        isSearching = true
   197→        error = nil
   198→
   199→        do {
   200→            if query.isEmpty {
   201→                // Load all active trainers from CMS marketplace
   202→                searchResults = try await useCase.searchByName("", limit: 20)
   203→            } else {
   204→                searchResults = try await useCase.searchByName(query, limit: 20)
   205→            }
   206→        } catch {
   207→            self.error = error
   208→            searchResults = []
   209→            #if DEBUG
   210→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Error searching trainers: \(error)")
   211→            #endif
   212→        }
   213→
   214→        isSearching = false
   215→    }
   216→
   217→    // MARK: - Find by Invite Code
   218→
   219→    func findByInviteCode() async {
   220→        guard let useCase = discoverTrainersUseCase else {
   221→            #if DEBUG
   222→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] DiscoverTrainersUseCase not available")
   223→            #endif
   224→            return
   225→        }
   226→
   227→        let code = inviteCode.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
   228→        guard !code.isEmpty else {
   229→            return
   230→        }
   231→
   232→        isSearching = true
   233→        error = nil
   234→
   235→        do {
   236→            if let trainer = try await useCase.findByInviteCode(code) {
   237→                selectedTrainer = trainer
   238→                showConnectionSheet = true
   239→            } else {
   240→                error = PersonalTrainerError.invalidInviteCode
   241→            }
   242→        } catch {
   243→            self.error = error
   244→            #if DEBUG
   245→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Error finding by invite code: \(error)")
   246→            #endif
   247→        }
   248→
   249→        isSearching = false
   250→    }
   251→
   252→    // MARK: - Request Connection
   253→
   254→    func requestConnection(to trainer: PersonalTrainer) async -> Bool {
   255→        guard let useCase = requestConnectionUseCase else {
   256→            #if DEBUG
   257→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] RequestTrainerConnectionUseCase not available")
   258→            #endif
   259→            return false
   260→        }
   261→
   262→        isRequestingConnection = true
   263→        error = nil
   264→
   265→        do {
   266→            let newRelationshipId = try await useCase.execute(trainerId: trainer.id)
   267→            relationshipId = newRelationshipId
   268→            currentTrainer = trainer
   269→            connectionStatus = .pending
   270→            showConnectionSheet = false
   271→            selectedTrainer = nil
   272→            searchResults = []
   273→            searchQuery = ""
   274→            inviteCode = ""
   275→            isRequestingConnection = false
   276→
   277→            // Register student in CMS so the trainer can assign workouts
   278→            await registerStudentInCMS(trainerId: trainer.id)
   279→
   280→            isRequestingConnection = false
   281→            return true
   282→        } catch {
   283→            self.error = error
   284→            isRequestingConnection = false
   285→            #if DEBUG
   286→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Error requesting connection: \(error)")
   287→            #endif
   288→            return false
   289→        }
   290→    }
   291→
   292→    // MARK: - CMS Student Registration
   293→
   294→    /// Registers the student in the CMS after a successful Firebase connection.
   295→    /// This is best-effort — failure does not block the connection flow.
   296→    private func registerStudentInCMS(trainerId: String) async {
   297→        guard let repo = cmsWorkoutRepository,
   298→              let authRepo = authRepository else {
   299→            #if DEBUG
   300→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] CMS registration skipped: dependencies not available")
   301→            #endif
   302→            return
   303→        }
   304→
   305→        do {
   306→            guard let user = try await authRepo.currentUser() else {
   307→                #if DEBUG
   308→                print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] CMS registration skipped: no current user")
   309→                #endif
   310→                return
   311→            }
   312→
   313→            try await repo.registerStudent(
   314→                firebaseUid: user.id,
   315→                trainerId: trainerId,
   316→                displayName: user.displayName,
   317→                email: user.email
   318→            )
   319→
   320→            #if DEBUG
   321→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Student registered in CMS for trainer \(trainerId)")
   322→            #endif
   323→        } catch {
   324→            #if DEBUG
   325→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] CMS registration failed (non-blocking): \(error)")
   326→            #endif
   327→        }
   328→    }
   329→
   330→    // MARK: - Cancel Connection
   331→
   332→    func cancelConnection() async -> Bool {
   333→        guard let useCase = cancelConnectionUseCase,
   334→              let relId = relationshipId else {
   335→            #if DEBUG
   336→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] CancelTrainerConnectionUseCase not available or no relationship")
   337→            #endif
   338→            return false
   339→        }
   340→
   341→        isLoading = true
   342→        error = nil
   343→
   344→        do {
   345→            try await useCase.execute(relationshipId: relId)
   346→            currentTrainer = nil
   347→            connectionStatus = nil
   348→            relationshipId = nil
   349→            assignedWorkouts = []
   350→            isLoading = false
   351→            return true
   352→        } catch {
   353→            self.error = error
   354→            isLoading = false
   355→            #if DEBUG
   356→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Error canceling connection: \(error)")
   357→            #endif
   358→            return false
   359→        }
   360→    }
   361→
   362→    // MARK: - Load Assigned Workouts
   363→
   364→    private func loadAssignedWorkouts() async {
   365→        // Try CMS workouts first (primary source)
   366→        if let cmsUseCase = fetchCMSWorkoutsUseCase {
   367→            do {
   368→                let result = try await cmsUseCase.execute()
   369→                assignedWorkouts = result.workouts
   370→                #if DEBUG
   371→                print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Loaded \(result.workouts.count) CMS workouts")
   372→                #endif
   373→                return
   374→            } catch {
   375→                #if DEBUG
   376→                print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] CMS workouts failed, falling back to Firebase: \(error)")
   377→                #endif
   378→            }
   379→        }
   380→
   381→        // Fallback to Firebase workouts
   382→        guard let useCase = fetchAssignedWorkoutsUseCase else {
   383→            return
   384→        }
   385→
   386→        do {
   387→            assignedWorkouts = try await useCase.execute()
   388→        } catch {
   389→            #if DEBUG
   390→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Error loading workouts: \(error)")
   391→            #endif
   392→        }
   393→    }
   394→
   395→    // MARK: - Observation
   396→
   397→    private func startObservingRelationship() {
   398→        observationTask?.cancel()
   399→        observationTask = Task {
   400→            guard let useCase = getCurrentTrainerUseCase else { return }
   401→
   402→            for await relationship in useCase.observeRelationship() {
   403→                guard !Task.isCancelled else { break }
   404→
   405→                if let rel = relationship, rel.status != .cancelled {
   406→                    connectionStatus = rel.status
   407→                    relationshipId = rel.id
   408→
   409→                    // Reload trainer if status changed to active
   410→                    if rel.status == .active && currentTrainer == nil {
   411→                        await loadCurrentTrainer()
   412→                    }
   413→                } else {
   414→                    // nil or cancelled — treat as no trainer
   415→                    currentTrainer = nil
   416→                    connectionStatus = nil
   417→                    relationshipId = nil
   418→                }
   419→            }
   420→        }
   421→    }
   422→
   423→    private func startObservingWorkouts() {
   424→        workoutsObservationTask?.cancel()
   425→        workoutsObservationTask = Task {
   426→            guard let useCase = fetchAssignedWorkoutsUseCase else { return }
   427→
   428→            for await workouts in useCase.observe() {
   429→                guard !Task.isCancelled else { break }
   430→                assignedWorkouts = workouts
   431→            }
   432→        }
   433→    }
   434→
   435→    // MARK: - UI Helpers
   436→
   437→    func selectTrainer(_ trainer: PersonalTrainer) {
   438→        selectedTrainer = trainer
   439→        showConnectionSheet = true
   440→    }
   441→
   442→    func dismissConnectionSheet() {
   443→        showConnectionSheet = false
   444→        selectedTrainer = nil
   445→    }
   446→
   447→    func clearError() {
   448→        error = nil
   449→    }
   450→
   451→    func clearSearch() {
   452→        searchQuery = ""
   453→        Task { await searchTrainers() }
   454→    }
   455→}

1→//
     2→//  FeatureFlag.swift
     3→//  FitToday
     4→//
     5→//  Feature flags for remote configuration of features.
     6→//  Used to control feature rollout and A/B testing.
     7→//
     8→
     9→import Foundation
    10→
    11→// MARK: - Feature Flag Key
    12→
    13→/// Keys for remote feature flags controlled via Firebase Remote Config.
    14→/// Each key corresponds to a boolean flag that can be toggled remotely.
    15→enum FeatureFlagKey: String, CaseIterable, Sendable {
    16→
    17→    // MARK: - AI Features
    18→
    19→    /// Enables AI-powered workout generation (OpenAI).
    20→    case aiWorkoutGenerationEnabled = "ai_workout_generation_enabled"
    21→
    22→    /// Enables AI exercise substitution during active workout.
    23→    case aiExerciseSubstitutionEnabled = "ai_exercise_substitution_enabled"
    24→
    25→    // MARK: - Social Features
    26→
    27→    /// Enables group creation, joining, and management.
    28→    case socialGroupsEnabled = "social_groups_enabled"
    29→
    30→    /// Enables workout challenges within groups.
    31→    case challengesEnabled = "challenges_enabled"
    32→
    33→    /// Enables leaderboard ranking in groups.
    34→    case leaderboardEnabled = "leaderboard_enabled"
    35→
    36→    /// Enables photo check-in for challenge validation.
    37→    case checkInEnabled = "check_in_enabled"
    38→
    39→    /// Enables group streak tracking and display.
    40→    case groupStreaksEnabled = "group_streaks_enabled"
    41→
    42→    /// Enables social feed with workout proof posts.
    43→    case socialFeedEnabled = "social_feed_enabled"
    44→
    45→    // MARK: - Health & Sync
    46→
    47→    /// Enables Apple Health read/write integration.
    48→    case healthKitSyncEnabled = "healthkit_sync_enabled"
    49→
    50→    /// Enables activity stats with Swift Charts.
    51→    case statsChartsEnabled = "stats_charts_enabled"
    52→
    53→    // MARK: - Content
    54→
    55→    /// Enables structured training programs.
    56→    case programsEnabled = "programs_enabled"
    57→
    58→    /// Enables user-created workout templates.
    59→    case customWorkoutsEnabled = "custom_workouts_enabled"
    60→
    61→    /// Enables exercise library/explorer.
    62→    case exerciseLibraryEnabled = "exercise_library_enabled"
    63→
    64→    // MARK: - Personal Trainer
    65→
    66→    /// Enables personal trainer integration features.
    67→    /// When enabled, users can connect with personal trainers via CMS.
    68→    case personalTrainerEnabled = "personal_trainer_enabled"
    69→
    70→    /// Enables synchronization of workouts from CMS.
    71→    /// When enabled, trainer-assigned workouts sync to the user's app.
    72→    case cmsWorkoutSyncEnabled = "cms_workout_sync_enabled"
    73→
    74→    /// Enables chat functionality with personal trainers.
    75→    /// When enabled, users can message their assigned trainer.
    76→    case trainerChatEnabled = "trainer_chat_enabled"
    77→
    78→    // MARK: - Monetization & UX
    79→
    80→    /// Enables paywall/Pro upgrade prompts.
    81→    case paywallEnabled = "paywall_enabled"
    82→
    83→    /// Enables App Store review request after workout completion.
    84→    case reviewRequestEnabled = "review_request_enabled"
    85→
    86→    // MARK: - Operational
    87→
    88→    /// Shows maintenance banner and disables write operations.
    89→    case maintenanceModeEnabled = "maintenance_mode_enabled"
    90→
    91→    /// Shows non-dismissable update dialog directing to App Store.
    92→    case forceUpdateEnabled = "force_update_enabled"
    93→
    94→    // MARK: - Display Name
    95→
    96→    /// Human-readable display name for the feature flag.
    97→    var displayName: String {
    98→        switch self {
    99→        // AI
   100→        case .aiWorkoutGenerationEnabled: return "AI Workout Generation"
   101→        case .aiExerciseSubstitutionEnabled: return "AI Exercise Substitution"
   102→        // Social
   103→        case .socialGroupsEnabled: return "Social Groups"
   104→        case .challengesEnabled: return "Challenges"
   105→        case .leaderboardEnabled: return "Leaderboard"
   106→        case .checkInEnabled: return "Check-In"
   107→        case .groupStreaksEnabled: return "Group Streaks"
   108→        case .socialFeedEnabled: return "Social Feed"
   109→        // Health
   110→        case .healthKitSyncEnabled: return "Apple Health Sync"
   111→        case .statsChartsEnabled: return "Stats Charts"
   112→        // Content
   113→        case .programsEnabled: return "Training Programs"
   114→        case .customWorkoutsEnabled: return "Custom Workouts"
   115→        case .exerciseLibraryEnabled: return "Exercise Library"
   116→        // Personal Trainer
   117→        case .personalTrainerEnabled: return "Personal Trainer Integration"
   118→        case .cmsWorkoutSyncEnabled: return "CMS Workout Sync"
   119→        case .trainerChatEnabled: return "Trainer Chat"
   120→        // Monetization
   121→        case .paywallEnabled: return "Paywall"
   122→        case .reviewRequestEnabled: return "Review Request"
   123→        // Operational
   124→        case .maintenanceModeEnabled: return "Maintenance Mode"
   125→        case .forceUpdateEnabled: return "Force Update"
   126→        }
   127→    }
   128→
   129→    // MARK: - Default Value
   130→
   131→    /// Default value when remote config is unavailable.
   132→    /// Existing features default to `true` (no regression).
   133→    /// Unreleased features default to `false`.
   134→    var defaultValue: Bool {
   135→        switch self {
   136→        // Unreleased features — disabled by default
   137→        case .socialFeedEnabled,
   138→             .personalTrainerEnabled,
   139→             .cmsWorkoutSyncEnabled,
   140→             .trainerChatEnabled,
   141→             .maintenanceModeEnabled,
   142→             .forceUpdateEnabled:
   143→            return false
   144→
   145→        // All existing features — enabled by default
   146→        default:
   147→            return true
   148→        }
   149→    }
   150→}
   151→

1→//
     2→//  PersonalTrainerModels.swift
     3→//  FitToday
     4→//
     5→//  Created by Claude on 04/02/26.
     6→//
     7→
     8→import Foundation
     9→
    10→// MARK: - Personal Trainer
    11→
    12→/// Represents a personal trainer in the CMS integration system.
    13→///
    14→/// Personal trainers can create workout plans through the CMS portal and
    15→/// connect with students (app users) to deliver personalized training programs.
    16→struct PersonalTrainer: Sendable, Identifiable, Hashable, Codable {
    17→    /// Unique identifier for the trainer (Firebase UID).
    18→    let id: String
    19→
    20→    /// Display name shown to students.
    21→    var displayName: String
    22→
    23→    /// Trainer's email address.
    24→    var email: String
    25→
    26→    /// URL to the trainer's profile photo.
    27→    var photoURL: URL?
    28→
    29→    /// Areas of expertise (e.g., "strength", "weight_loss", "flexibility").
    30→    var specializations: [String]
    31→
    32→    /// Short biography or description.
    33→    var bio: String?
    34→
    35→    /// Whether the trainer is currently accepting new students.
    36→    var isActive: Bool
    37→
    38→    /// Unique invite code students can use to connect.
    39→    var inviteCode: String?
    40→
    41→    /// Maximum number of students this trainer can manage.
    42→    var maxStudents: Int
    43→
    44→    /// Current number of connected students.
    45→    var currentStudentCount: Int
    46→
    47→    /// Average rating from reviews (0-5).
    48→    var rating: Double?
    49→
    50→    /// Number of reviews received.
    51→    var reviewCount: Int?
    52→
    53→    /// Whether the trainer can accept more students.
    54→    var canAcceptStudents: Bool {
    55→        isActive && currentStudentCount < maxStudents
    56→    }
    57→}
    58→
    59→// MARK: - Trainer Student Relationship
    60→
    61→/// Represents the connection between a personal trainer and a student.
    62→///
    63→/// This relationship tracks the lifecycle from initial request through
    64→/// active training to potential cancellation.
    65→struct TrainerStudentRelationship: Sendable, Identifiable, Hashable, Codable {
    66→    /// Unique identifier for this relationship.
    67→    let id: String
    68→
    69→    /// The personal trainer's identifier.
    70→    let trainerId: String
    71→
    72→    /// The student's identifier (app user).
    73→    let studentId: String
    74→
    75→    /// Current status of the connection.
    76→    var status: TrainerConnectionStatus
    77→
    78→    /// Who initiated the connection request.
    79→    let requestedBy: RequestedBy
    80→
    81→    /// When the connection was requested.
    82→    let requestedAt: Date
    83→
    84→    /// When the connection was accepted (nil if still pending).
    85→    var acceptedAt: Date?
    86→
    87→    /// Current subscription status for this relationship.
    88→    var subscriptionStatus: TrainerSubscriptionStatus
    89→
    90→    /// When the subscription expires (nil for unlimited).
    91→    var subscriptionExpiresAt: Date?
    92→
    93→    /// Whether the relationship is currently active and valid.
    94→    var isValid: Bool {
    95→        status == .active && (subscriptionStatus == .active || subscriptionStatus == .trial)
    96→    }
    97→}
    98→
    99→// MARK: - Connection Status
   100→
   101→/// Status of the trainer-student connection.
   102→enum TrainerConnectionStatus: String, Sendable, CaseIterable, Codable {
   103→    /// Connection request is pending approval.
   104→    case pending
   105→
   106→    /// Connection is active and trainer can assign workouts.
   107→    case active
   108→
   109→    /// Connection is temporarily paused.
   110→    case paused
   111→
   112→    /// Connection has been cancelled by either party.
   113→    case cancelled
   114→}
   115→
   116→// MARK: - Subscription Status
   117→
   118→/// Subscription status for the trainer-student relationship.
   119→enum TrainerSubscriptionStatus: String, Sendable, CaseIterable, Codable {
   120→    /// Student is in trial period.
   121→    case trial
   122→
   123→    /// Subscription is active and paid.
   124→    case active
   125→
   126→    /// Subscription has expired.
   127→    case expired
   128→}
   129→
   130→// MARK: - Request Initiator
   131→
   132→/// Who initiated the trainer-student connection request.
   133→enum RequestedBy: String, Sendable, CaseIterable, Codable {
   134→    /// Student requested connection with trainer.
   135→    case student
   136→
   137→    /// Trainer invited the student.
   138→    case trainer
   139→}
   140→
   141→// MARK: - Trainer Workout
   142→
   143→/// Represents a workout assigned by a personal trainer to a student.
   144→///
   145→/// This is a domain model that wraps trainer-created workout data with
   146→/// attribution and scheduling information. It can be converted to a
   147→/// `WorkoutPlan` for execution in the app.
   148→struct TrainerWorkout: Sendable, Identifiable, Hashable, Codable {
   149→    /// Unique identifier for this workout.
   150→    let id: String
   151→
   152→    /// The trainer who created this workout.
   153→    let trainerId: String
   154→
   155→    /// Workout title/name.
   156→    var title: String
   157→
   158→    /// Optional description of the workout.
   159→    var description: String?
   160→
   161→    /// Focus area of the workout.
   162→    var focus: DailyFocus
   163→
   164→    /// Estimated duration in minutes.
   165→    var estimatedDurationMinutes: Int
   166→
   167→    /// Workout intensity level.
   168→    var intensity: WorkoutIntensity
   169→
   170→    /// Workout phases containing exercises.
   171→    var phases: [TrainerWorkoutPhase]
   172→
   173→    /// Schedule configuration for the workout.
   174→    var schedule: TrainerWorkoutSchedule
   175→
   176→    /// Whether the workout is currently active.
   177→    var isActive: Bool
   178→
   179→    /// When the workout was created.
   180→    var createdAt: Date
   181→
   182→    /// Version number for tracking updates.
   183→    var version: Int
   184→
   185→    /// Optional PDF URL for the workout attachment.
   186→    var pdfUrl: String?
   187→}
   188→
   189→// MARK: - Trainer Workout Phase
   190→
   191→/// Represents a phase/section within a trainer workout.
   192→struct TrainerWorkoutPhase: Sendable, Hashable, Codable {
   193→    /// Phase name (e.g., "Warmup", "Main Set", "Cooldown").
   194→    var name: String
   195→
   196→    /// Items/exercises in this phase.
   197→    var items: [TrainerWorkoutItem]
   198→}
   199→
   200→// MARK: - Trainer Workout Item
   201→
   202→/// Represents an individual exercise within a trainer workout phase.
   203→struct TrainerWorkoutItem: Sendable, Hashable, Codable {
   204→    /// Optional exercise ID from external sources.
   205→    var exerciseId: Int?
   206→
   207→    /// Exercise name.
   208→    var exerciseName: String
   209→
   210→    /// Number of sets to perform.
   211→    var sets: Int
   212→
   213→    /// Rep range (e.g., lower: 8, upper: 12).
   214→    var reps: IntRange
   215→
   216→    /// Rest period between sets in seconds.
   217→    var restSeconds: Int
   218→
   219→    /// Optional notes or instructions.
   220→    var notes: String?
   221→}
   222→
   223→// MARK: - Trainer Workout Schedule
   224→
   225→/// Schedule configuration for trainer workouts.
   226→struct TrainerWorkoutSchedule: Sendable, Hashable, Codable {
   227→    /// Schedule type.
   228→    var type: TrainerWorkoutScheduleType
   229→
   230→    /// Specific date for "once" type schedules.
   231→    var scheduledDate: Date?
   232→
   233→    /// Day of week (0-6, Sunday-Saturday) for "weekly" type schedules.
   234→    var dayOfWeek: Int?
   235→}
   236→
   237→// MARK: - Trainer Workout Schedule Type
   238→
   239→/// Type of schedule for trainer workouts.

    41→/// Repository protocol for trainer-student relationship operations.

    57→        studentDisplayName: String
    58→    ) async throws -> String
    59→
    60→    /// Cancels an existing trainer-student connection.
    61→    ///
    62→    /// - Parameter relationshipId: The relationship's unique identifier.

    66→    /// Fetches the current active relationship for a student.

    39→enum AppRoute: Hashable {

    67→    case aiChat  // AI Fitness Assistant (FitOrb)

    70→
    71→struct DeepLink {
    72→    enum Destination {
    73→        case home
    74→        case onboarding
    75→        case setup
    76→        case paywall
    77→        case groupInvite(groupId: String)
    78→        case trainerDashboard
    79→        case trainerChat
    80→        case workoutExecution
    81→    }
    82→
    83→    let destination: Destination
    84→
    85→    init?(url: URL) {
    86→        guard let scheme = url.scheme?.lowercased(), scheme == "fittoday" else {
    87→            return nil
    88→        }
    89→
    90→        let host = url.host?.lowercased() ?? ""
    91→        let path = url.path.lowercased()
    92→
    93→        // Handle group invite: fittoday://group/invite/{groupId}
    94→        if host == "group", path.hasPrefix("/invite/") {
    95→            let groupId = String(path.dropFirst("/invite/".count))
    96→            destination = .groupInvite(groupId: groupId)
    97→            return
    98→        }
    99→
   100→        // Handle workout routes: fittoday://workout/execution
   101→        if host == "workout", path == "/execution" {
   102→            destination = .workoutExecution
   103→            return
   104→        }
   105→
   106→        // Handle trainer routes: fittoday://trainer/dashboard, fittoday://trainer/chat
   107→        if host == "trainer" {
   108→            switch path.lowercased() {
   109→            case "/dashboard":
   110→                destination = .trainerDashboard
   111→                return
   112→            case "/chat":
   113→                destination = .trainerChat
   114→                return
   115→            default:
   116→                break
   117→            }
   118→        }
   119→
   120→        // Handle other routes
   121→        let pathOrHost = !host.isEmpty ? host : path
   122→        switch pathOrHost {
   123→        case "home", "/home":
   124→            destination = .home
   125→        case "onboarding", "/onboarding":
   126→            destination = .onboarding
   127→        case "setup", "/setup":
   128→            destination = .setup
   129→        case "paywall", "/paywall":
   130→            destination = .paywall
   131→        default:
   132→            return nil
   133→        }
   134→    }
   135→}
   136→
   137→@MainActor
   138→protocol AppRouting: AnyObject {
   139→    var selectedTab: AppTab { get set }
   140→    var tabPaths: [AppTab: NavigationPath] { get set }
   141→
   142→    func select(tab: AppTab)
   143→    func push(_ route: AppRoute, on tab: AppTab?)
   144→    func pop(on tab: AppTab?)
   145→    func handle(deeplink: DeepLink)
   146→}
   147→
   148→// 💡 Learn: Navegação com @Observable permite melhor performance
   149→@MainActor
   150→@Observable final class AppRouter: AppRouting {
   151→    var selectedTab: AppTab = .home
   152→    var tabPaths: [AppTab: NavigationPath] = [:]
   153→
   154→    init() {
   155→        AppTab.allCases.forEach { tab in
   156→            tabPaths[tab] = NavigationPath()
   157→        }
   158→    }
   159→
   160→    func select(tab: AppTab) {
   161→        selectedTab = tab
   162→    }
   163→
   164→    func push(_ route: AppRoute, on tab: AppTab? = nil) {
   165→        let target = tab ?? selectedTab
   166→        if tabPaths[target] == nil {
   167→            tabPaths[target] = NavigationPath()
   168→        }
   169→        tabPaths[target]?.append(route)
   170→    }
   171→
   172→    func pop(on tab: AppTab? = nil) {
   173→        let target = tab ?? selectedTab
   174→        guard var path = tabPaths[target], !path.isEmpty else {
   175→            return
   176→        }
   177→        path.removeLast()
   178→        tabPaths[target] = path
   179→    }
   180→
   181→    func handle(deeplink: DeepLink) {
   182→        switch deeplink.destination {
   183→        case .home:
   184→            select(tab: .home)
   185→        case .onboarding:
   186→            select(tab: .home)
   187→            push(.onboarding, on: .home)
   188→        case .setup:
   189→            select(tab: .home)
   190→            push(.setup, on: .home)
   191→        case .paywall:
   192→            select(tab: .home)
   193→            push(.paywall, on: .home)
   194→        case .groupInvite(let groupId):
   195→            select(tab: .home)
   196→            push(.groupInvite(groupId: groupId), on: .home)
   197→        case .trainerDashboard:
   198→            select(tab: .home)
   199→            push(.trainerDashboard, on: .home)
   200→        case .trainerChat:

     8→import FirebaseFirestore
     9→import Foundation
    10→
    11→// MARK: - FirebasePersonalTrainerService
    12→
    13→/// Actor-based service for Firebase personal trainer operations.
    14→///
    15→/// Handles all Firestore interactions for personal trainers and
    16→/// trainer-student relationships.
    17→actor FirebasePersonalTrainerService {
    18→    private let db = Firestore.firestore()
    19→
    20→    // MARK: - Collection References
    21→
    22→    private var trainersCollection: CollectionReference {
    23→        db.collection("personalTrainers")
    24→    }
    25→
    26→    private var relationshipsCollection: CollectionReference {
    27→        db.collection("trainerStudents")
    28→    }
    29→
    30→    // MARK: - Fetch Trainer
    31→
    32→    /// Fetches a personal trainer by their ID.
    33→    ///
    34→    /// - Parameter id: The trainer's document ID.
    35→    /// - Returns: The Firebase trainer DTO.
    36→    /// - Throws: An error if the trainer is not found or fetch fails.
    37→    func fetchTrainer(id: String) async throws -> FBPersonalTrainer {
    38→        let snapshot = try await trainersCollection.document(id).getDocument()
    39→
    40→        guard snapshot.exists else {
    41→            throw NSError(
    42→                domain: "FirebasePersonalTrainerService",
    43→                code: 404,
    44→                userInfo: [NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "Personal trainer not found"]
    45→            )
    46→        }
    47→
    48→        return try snapshot.data(as: FBPersonalTrainer.self)
    49→    }
    50→
    51→    // MARK: - Search Trainers
    52→
    53→    /// Searches for personal trainers by display name.
    54→    ///
    55→    /// - Parameters:
    56→    ///   - query: The search query string.
    57→    ///   - limit: Maximum number of results to return.
    58→    /// - Returns: An array of tuples containing document IDs and trainer DTOs.
    59→    func searchTrainers(query: String, limit: Int) async throws -> [(String, FBPersonalTrainer)] {
    60→        // Use Firestore's prefix query for display name search
    61→        let normalizedQuery = query.lowercased()
    62→        let endQuery = normalizedQuery + "\u{f8ff}"
    63→
    64→        let snapshot = try await trainersCollection
    65→            .whereField("isActive", isEqualTo: true)
    66→            .whereField("displayName", isGreaterThanOrEqualTo: normalizedQuery)
    67→            .whereField("displayName", isLessThanOrEqualTo: endQuery)
    68→            .limit(to: limit)
    69→            .getDocuments()
    70→
    71→        return try snapshot.documents.compactMap { doc -> (String, FBPersonalTrainer)? in
    72→            let trainer = try doc.data(as: FBPersonalTrainer.self)
    73→            return (doc.documentID, trainer)
    74→        }
    75→    }

1→//
     2→//  EntitlementPolicy.swift
     3→//  FitToday
     4→//
     5→//  Política centralizada de acesso a features baseada no entitlement.
     6→//
     7→
     8→import Foundation
     9→
    10→// MARK: - Feature Enum
    11→
    12→/// Features que requerem verificação de acesso
    13→enum ProFeature: String, CaseIterable {
    14→    // Treinos IA
    15→    case aiWorkoutGeneration = "ai_workout_generation"
    16→    case aiExerciseSubstitution = "ai_exercise_substitution"
    17→
    18→    // Tracking avançado
    19→    case unlimitedHistory = "unlimited_history"
    20→    case advancedDOMSAdjustment = "advanced_doms_adjustment"
    21→
    22→    // Biblioteca
    23→    case premiumPrograms = "premium_programs"
    24→
    25→    // Configurações
    26→    case customizableSettings = "customizable_settings"
    27→
    28→    // Personal Trainer
    29→    case personalTrainer = "personal_trainer"
    30→    case trainerWorkouts = "trainer_workouts"
    31→
    32→    // Social
    33→    case simultaneousChallenges = "simultaneous_challenges"
    34→
    35→    // AI Chat
    36→    case aiChat = "ai_chat"
    37→
    38→    var displayName: String {
    39→        switch self {
    40→        case .aiWorkoutGeneration: return "Treinos personalizados por IA"
    41→        case .aiExerciseSubstitution: return "Substituição inteligente de exercícios"
    42→        case .unlimitedHistory: return "Histórico ilimitado"
    43→        case .advancedDOMSAdjustment: return "Ajuste por dor muscular"
    44→        case .premiumPrograms: return "Programas premium"
    45→        case .customizableSettings: return "Configurações avançadas"
    46→        case .personalTrainer: return "Personal Trainer"
    47→        case .trainerWorkouts: return "Treinos do Personal"
    48→        case .simultaneousChallenges: return "Desafios simultâneos ilimitados"
    49→        case .aiChat: return "Assistente IA FitOrb"
    50→        }
    51→    }
    52→}
    53→
    54→// MARK: - Access Result
    55→
    56→/// Resultado da verificação de acesso
    57→enum FeatureAccessResult {
    58→    case allowed
    59→    case limitReached(remaining: Int, limit: Int)
    60→    case requiresPro(feature: ProFeature)
    61→    case requiresElite(feature: ProFeature)
    62→    case trialExpired
    63→    case featureDisabled(reason: String)
    64→
    65→    var isAllowed: Bool {
    66→        if case .allowed = self { return true }
    67→        return false
    68→    }
    69→
    70→    /// Indicates if the result is due to a disabled feature flag.
    71→    var isFeatureDisabled: Bool {
    72→        if case .featureDisabled = self { return true }
    73→        return false
    74→    }
    75→
    76→    var message: String {
    77→        switch self {
    78→        case .allowed:
    79→            return ""
    80→        case .limitReached(_, let limit):
    81→            return "Você atingiu o limite de \(limit) usos. Desbloqueie o Pro para mais."
    82→        case .requiresPro(let feature):
    83→            return "\(feature.displayName) é um recurso Pro. Desbloqueie o Pro para acessar."
    84→        case .requiresElite(let feature):
    85→            return "\(feature.displayName) é exclusivo do plano Elite. Faça upgrade para acessar."
    86→        case .trialExpired:
    87→            return "Seu período de teste terminou. Desbloqueie o Pro para continuar."
    88→        case .featureDisabled(let reason):
    89→            return reason
    90→        }
    91→    }
    92→}
    93→
    94→// MARK: - Entitlement Policy
    95→
    96→/// Política centralizada para verificação de acesso a features
    97→struct EntitlementPolicy {
    98→
    99→    // MARK: - Limites
   100→
   101→    /// Número de treinos IA por semana para usuários Free
   102→    static let freeAIWorkoutsPerWeek = 1
   103→
   104→    /// Número de treinos IA por dia para usuários Pro
   105→    static let proAIWorkoutsPerDay = 2
   106→
   107→    /// Dias de histórico para usuários Free
   108→    static let freeHistoryDaysLimit = 7
   109→
   110→    /// Número máximo de desafios simultâneos para Free
   111→    static let freeChallengesLimit = 5
   112→
   113→    /// Numero de mensagens AI chat por dia para usuarios Free
   114→    static let freeAIChatMessagesPerDay = 2
   115→
   116→    // MARK: - Verificação de Acesso
   117→
   118→    /// Verifica se o usuário pode acessar uma feature
   119→    /// - Parameters:
   120→    ///   - feature: Feature a ser verificada
   121→    ///   - entitlement: Entitlement atual do usuário
   122→    ///   - usageCount: Uso atual (semanal para Free AI, diário para Pro AI, contagem ativa para desafios)
   123→    /// - Returns: Resultado da verificação
   124→    static func canAccess(
   125→        _ feature: ProFeature,
   126→        entitlement: ProEntitlement,
   127→        usageCount: Int = 0
   128→    ) -> FeatureAccessResult {
   129→
   130→        // Subscription expired
   131→        if entitlement.isPro,
   132→           let expiration = entitlement.expirationDate,
   133→           expiration < Date() {
   134→            return .trialExpired
   135→        }
   136→
   137→        // Elite — acesso irrestrito a tudo
   138→        if entitlement.isElite {
   139→            return .allowed
   140→        }
   141→
   142→        // Pro — acesso com limites diários em IA (Personal Trainer é Elite-only)
   143→        if entitlement.isPro {
   144→            switch feature {
   145→            case .aiWorkoutGeneration:
   146→                if usageCount >= proAIWorkoutsPerDay {
   147→                    return .limitReached(remaining: 0, limit: proAIWorkoutsPerDay)
   148→                }
   149→                return .allowed
   150→            case .personalTrainer, .trainerWorkouts:
   151→                return .requiresElite(feature: feature)
   152→            default:
   153→                return .allowed
   154→            }
   155→        }
   156→
   157→        // Free — verificar features específicas
   158→        switch feature {
   159→        case .aiWorkoutGeneration:
   160→            if usageCount >= freeAIWorkoutsPerWeek {
   161→                return .limitReached(remaining: 0, limit: freeAIWorkoutsPerWeek)
   162→            }
   163→            return .allowed
   164→
   165→        case .simultaneousChallenges:
   166→            if usageCount >= freeChallengesLimit {
   167→                return .limitReached(remaining: 0, limit: freeChallengesLimit)
   168→            }
   169→            return .allowed
   170→
   171→        case .aiChat:
   172→            if usageCount >= freeAIChatMessagesPerDay {
   173→                return .limitReached(remaining: 0, limit: freeAIChatMessagesPerDay)
   174→            }
   175→            return .allowed
   176→
   177→        case .personalTrainer, .trainerWorkouts:
   178→            return .requiresElite(feature: feature)
   179→
   180→        case .aiExerciseSubstitution,
   181→             .unlimitedHistory,
   182→             .advancedDOMSAdjustment,
   183→             .premiumPrograms,
   184→             .customizableSettings:
   185→            return .requiresPro(feature: feature)
   186→        }
   187→    }
   188→
   189→    /// Verifica se uma feature é totalmente bloqueada para Free (requer Pro ou Elite)
   190→    static func isProOnly(_ feature: ProFeature) -> Bool {
   191→        switch feature {
   192→        case .aiWorkoutGeneration, .simultaneousChallenges, .aiChat:
   193→            return false // Free tem acesso limitado
   194→        case .personalTrainer, .trainerWorkouts:
   195→            return false // Elite-only, não Pro-only
   196→        case .aiExerciseSubstitution,
   197→             .unlimitedHistory,
   198→             .advancedDOMSAdjustment,
   199→             .premiumPrograms,
   200→             .customizableSettings:
   201→            return true
   202→        }
   203→    }
   204→
   205→    /// Verifica se uma feature é exclusiva do plano Elite
   206→    static func isEliteOnly(_ feature: ProFeature) -> Bool {
   207→        switch feature {
   208→        case .personalTrainer, .trainerWorkouts:
   209→            return true
   210→        default:
   211→            return false
   212→        }
   213→    }
   214→
   215→    /// Retorna o limite de uso para uma feature
   216→    static func usageLimit(for feature: ProFeature, entitlement: ProEntitlement) -> (limit: Int, period: String)? {
   217→        switch feature {
   218→        case .aiWorkoutGeneration:
   219→            if entitlement.isPro {
   220→                return (proAIWorkoutsPerDay, "dia")
   221→            } else {
   222→                return (freeAIWorkoutsPerWeek, "semana")
   223→            }
   224→        case .simultaneousChallenges:
   225→            if entitlement.isPro {
   226→                return nil // ilimitado
   227→            } else {
   228→                return (freeChallengesLimit, "simultâneos")
   229→            }
   230→        case .aiChat:
   231→            if entitlement.isPro {
   232→                return nil // ilimitado
   233→            } else {
   234→                return (freeAIChatMessagesPerDay, "dia")
   235→            }
   236→        default:
   237→            return nil
   238→        }
   239→    }
   240→
   241→    // MARK: - Helpers para UI
   242→
   243→    /// Retorna lista de features que são Pro-only para exibição
   244→    static var proOnlyFeatures: [ProFeature] {
   245→        ProFeature.allCases.filter { isProOnly($0) }
   246→    }
   247→
   248→    /// Retorna lista de features com limites para Free
   249→    static var limitedFreeFeatures: [(feature: ProFeature, freeLimit: String, proLimit: String)] {
   250→        [
   251→            (.aiWorkoutGeneration, "1/semana", "2/dia"),
   252→            (.simultaneousChallenges, "5", "∞"),
   253→            (.aiChat, "2/dia", "ilimitado")
   254→        ]
   255→    }
   256→}
   257→
   258→// MARK: - Convenience Extensions
   259→
   260→extension ProEntitlement {
   261→    /// Verifica acesso a uma feature usando a policy centralizada
   262→    func canAccess(_ feature: ProFeature, usageCount: Int = 0) -> FeatureAccessResult {
   263→        EntitlementPolicy.canAccess(feature, entitlement: self, usageCount: usageCount)
   264→    }
   265→
   266→    /// Verifica se tem acesso a uma feature (simplificado)
   267→    func hasAccess(to feature: ProFeature) -> Bool {
   268→        canAccess(feature).isAllowed
   269→    }
   270→}
   271→

### **Key Access Control Points**

1. **Feature Flag Check** (Required for any access):
   - `FeatureFlagKey.personalTrainerEnabled` must be `true` (defaults to `false`)
   - Checked in `PersonalTrainerViewModel.checkFeatureFlag()` (line 140-147)
   - HomeView renders card only if `isPersonalTrainerEnabled` (line 56)
   - All use cases check flag before executing

2. **Entitlement Check** (Elite-only):
   - `EntitlementPolicy.personalTrainer` requires Elite subscription
   - NOT available for Free or Pro users
   - Check method: `EntitlementPolicy.canAccess(.personalTrainer, entitlement:)` returns `.requiresElite()`

3. **Relationship Validation**:
   - Student must have active/pending connection to access trainer
   - Subscription status must be active or trial
   - `TrainerStudentRelationship.isValid` validation (line 94-96)

    10→// MARK: - Feature Enum
    11→
    12→/// Features que requerem verificação de acesso
    13→enum ProFeature: String, CaseIterable {
    14→    // Treinos IA
    15→    case aiWorkoutGeneration = "ai_workout_generation"
    16→    case aiExerciseSubstitution = "ai_exercise_substitution"
    17→

    38→    var displayName: String {

    41→        case .aiExerciseSubstitution: return "Substituição inteligente de exercícios"

    54→// MARK: - Access Result

    56→/// Resultado da verificação de acesso
    57→enum FeatureAccessResult {
    58→    case allowed
    59→    case limitReached(remaining: Int, limit: Int)
    60→    case requiresPro(feature: ProFeature)
    61→    case requiresElite(feature: ProFeature)
    62→    case trialExpired
    63→    case featureDisabled(reason: String)
    64→
    65→    var isAllowed: Bool {
    66→        if case .allowed = self { return true }

    84→        case .requiresElite(let feature):

    94→// MARK: - Entitlement Policy
    95→
    96→/// Política centralizada para verificação de acesso a features
    97→struct EntitlementPolicy {
    98→
    99→    // MARK: - Limites
   100→
   101→    /// Número de treinos IA por semana para usuários Free
   102→    static let freeAIWorkoutsPerWeek = 1
   103→
   104→    /// Número de treinos IA por dia para usuários Pro
   105→    static let proAIWorkoutsPerDay = 2
   106→
   107→    /// Dias de histórico para usuários Free
   108→    static let freeHistoryDaysLimit = 7
   109→
   110→    /// Número máximo de desafios simultâneos para Free
   111→    static let freeChallengesLimit = 5
   112→
   113→    /// Numero de mensagens AI chat por dia para usuarios Free
   114→    static let freeAIChatMessagesPerDay = 2
   115→
   116→    // MARK: - Verificação de Acesso
   117→
   118→    /// Verifica se o usuário pode acessar uma feature
   119→    /// - Parameters:
   120→    ///   - feature: Feature a ser verificada
   121→    ///   - entitlement: Entitlement atual do usuário
   122→    ///   - usageCount: Uso atual (semanal para Free AI, diário para Pro AI, contagem ativa para desafios)
   123→    /// - Returns: Resultado da verificação
   124→    static func canAccess(
   125→        _ feature: ProFeature,
   126→        entitlement: ProEntitlement,
   127→        usageCount: Int = 0
   128→    ) -> FeatureAccessResult {
   129→
   130→        // Subscription expired
   131→        if entitlement.isPro,
   132→           let expiration = entitlement.expirationDate,
   133→           expiration < Date() {
   134→            return .trialExpired
   135→        }
   136→
   137→        // Elite — acesso irrestrito a tudo
   138→        if entitlement.isElite {
   139→            return .allowed
   140→        }
   141→
   142→        // Pro — acesso com limites diários em IA (Personal Trainer é Elite-only)
   143→        if entitlement.isPro {
   144→            switch feature {
   145→            case .aiWorkoutGeneration:
   146→                if usageCount >= proAIWorkoutsPerDay {
   147→                    return .limitReached(remaining: 0, limit: proAIWorkoutsPerDay)
   148→                }
   149→                return .allowed
   150→            case .personalTrainer, .trainerWorkouts:
   151→                return .requiresElite(feature: feature)
   152→            default:
   153→                return .allowed
   154→            }
   155→        }
   156→
   157→        // Free — verificar features específicas
   158→        switch feature {
   159→        case .aiWorkoutGeneration:
   160→            if usageCount >= freeAIWorkoutsPerWeek {
   161→                return .limitReached(remaining: 0, limit: freeAIWorkoutsPerWeek)
   162→            }
   163→            return .allowed
   164→
   165→        case .simultaneousChallenges:
   166→            if usageCount >= freeChallengesLimit {
   167→                return .limitReached(remaining: 0, limit: freeChallengesLimit)
   168→            }
   169→            return .allowed
   170→
   171→        case .aiChat:
   172→            if usageCount >= freeAIChatMessagesPerDay {
   173→                return .limitReached(remaining: 0, limit: freeAIChatMessagesPerDay)
   174→            }
   175→            return .allowed
   176→
   177→        case .personalTrainer, .trainerWorkouts:
   178→            return .requiresElite(feature: feature)
   179→
   180→        case .aiExerciseSubstitution,
   181→             .unlimitedHistory,
   182→             .advancedDOMSAdjustment,
   183→             .premiumPrograms,
   184→             .customizableSettings:
   185→            return .requiresPro(feature: feature)
   186→        }
   187→    }
   188→
   189→    /// Verifica se uma feature é totalmente bloqueada para Free (requer Pro ou Elite)
   190→    static func isProOnly(_ feature: ProFeature) -> Bool {
   191→        switch feature {
   192→        case .aiWorkoutGeneration, .simultaneousChallenges, .aiChat:
   193→            return false // Free tem acesso limitado
   194→        case .personalTrainer, .trainerWorkouts:
   195→            return false // Elite-only, não Pro-only
   196→        case .aiExerciseSubstitution,
   197→             .unlimitedHistory,
   198→             .advancedDOMSAdjustment,
   199→             .premiumPrograms,
   200→             .customizableSettings:
   201→            return true
   202→        }
   203→    }
   204→
   205→    /// Verifica se uma feature é exclusiva do plano Elite
   206→    static func isEliteOnly(_ feature: ProFeature) -> Bool {
   207→        switch feature {
   208→        case .personalTrainer, .trainerWorkouts:
   209→            return true
   210→        default:
   211→            return false
   212→        }
   213→    }
   214→
   215→    /// Retorna o limite de uso para uma feature
   216→    static func usageLimit(for feature: ProFeature, entitlement: ProEntitlement) -> (limit: Int, period: String)? {
   217→        switch feature {
   218→        case .aiWorkoutGeneration:
   219→            if entitlement.isPro {
   220→                return (proAIWorkoutsPerDay, "dia")
   221→            } else {
   222→                return (freeAIWorkoutsPerWeek, "semana")
   223→            }
   224→        case .simultaneousChallenges:
   225→            if entitlement.isPro {
   226→                return nil // ilimitado
   227→            } else {
   228→                return (freeChallengesLimit, "simultâneos")
   229→            }
   230→        case .aiChat:
   231→            if entitlement.isPro {
   232→                return nil // ilimitado
   233→            } else {
   234→                return (freeAIChatMessagesPerDay, "dia")
   235→            }
   236→        default:
   237→            return nil
   238→        }
   239→    }
   240→
   241→    // MARK: - Helpers para UI
   242→
   243→    /// Retorna lista de features que são Pro-only para exibição
   244→    static var proOnlyFeatures: [ProFeature] {
   245→        ProFeature.allCases.filter { isProOnly($0) }
   246→    }
   247→
   248→    /// Retorna lista de features com limites para Free
   249→    static var limitedFreeFeatures: [(feature: ProFeature, freeLimit: String, proLimit: String)] {
   250→        [
   251→            (.aiWorkoutGeneration, "1/semana", "2/dia"),
   252→            (.simultaneousChallenges, "5", "∞"),
   253→            (.aiChat, "2/dia", "ilimitado")
   254→        ]
   255→    }
   256→}
   257→
   258→// MARK: - Convenience Extensions
   259→
   260→extension ProEntitlement {
   261→    /// Verifica acesso a uma feature usando a policy centralizada
   262→    func canAccess(_ feature: ProFeature, usageCount: Int = 0) -> FeatureAccessResult {
   263→        EntitlementPolicy.canAccess(feature, entitlement: self, usageCount: usageCount)
   264→    }
   265→
   266→    /// Verifica se tem acesso a uma feature (simplificado)
   267→    func hasAccess(to feature: ProFeature) -> Bool {
   268→        canAccess(feature).isAllowed
   269→    }
   270→}

   150→
   151→    func loadCurrentTrainer() async {
   152→        guard let useCase = getCurrentTrainerUseCase else {
   153→            #if DEBUG
   154→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] GetCurrentTrainerUseCase not available")
   155→            #endif
   156→            return
   157→        }
   158→
   159→        isLoading = true
   160→        error = nil
   161→
   162→        do {
   163→            if let result = try await useCase.execute() {
   164→                currentTrainer = result.trainer
   165→                connectionStatus = result.relationship.status
   166→                relationshipId = result.relationship.id
   167→                await loadAssignedWorkouts()
   168→            } else {
   169→                currentTrainer = nil
   170→                connectionStatus = nil
   171→                relationshipId = nil
   172→                assignedWorkouts = []
   173→            }
   174→        } catch {
   175→            self.error = error
   176→            #if DEBUG
   177→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Error loading trainer: \(error)")
   178→            #endif
   179→        }
   180→
   181→        isLoading = false
   182→    }
   183→
   184→    // MARK: - Search Trainers
   185→
   186→    func searchTrainers() async {
   187→        guard let useCase = discoverTrainersUseCase else {
   188→            #if DEBUG
   189→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] DiscoverTrainersUseCase not available")
   190→            #endif
   191→            return
   192→        }
   193→
   194→        let query = searchQuery.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
   195→
   196→        isSearching = true
   197→        error = nil
   198→
   199→        do {
   200→            if query.isEmpty {
   201→                // Load all active trainers from CMS marketplace
   202→                searchResults = try await useCase.searchByName("", limit: 20)
   203→            } else {
   204→                searchResults = try await useCase.searchByName(query, limit: 20)
   205→            }
   206→        } catch {
   207→            self.error = error
   208→            searchResults = []
   209→            #if DEBUG
   210→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Error searching trainers: \(error)")
   211→            #endif
   212→        }
   213→
   214→        isSearching = false
   215→    }
   216→
   217→    // MARK: - Find by Invite Code
   218→
   219→    func findByInviteCode() async {
   220→        guard let useCase = discoverTrainersUseCase else {
   221→            #if DEBUG
   222→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] DiscoverTrainersUseCase not available")
   223→            #endif
   224→            return
   225→        }
   226→
   227→        let code = inviteCode.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
   228→        guard !code.isEmpty else {
   229→            return
   230→        }
   231→
   232→        isSearching = true
   233→        error = nil
   234→
   235→        do {
   236→            if let trainer = try await useCase.findByInviteCode(code) {
   237→                selectedTrainer = trainer
   238→                showConnectionSheet = true
   239→            } else {
   240→                error = PersonalTrainerError.invalidInviteCode
   241→            }
   242→        } catch {
   243→            self.error = error
   244→            #if DEBUG
   245→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Error finding by invite code: \(error)")
   246→            #endif
   247→        }
   248→
   249→        isSearching = false
   250→    }
   251→
   252→    // MARK: - Request Connection
   253→
   254→    func requestConnection(to trainer: PersonalTrainer) async -> Bool {
   255→        guard let useCase = requestConnectionUseCase else {
   256→            #if DEBUG
   257→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] RequestTrainerConnectionUseCase not available")
   258→            #endif
   259→            return false
   260→        }
   261→
   262→        isRequestingConnection = true
   263→        error = nil
   264→
   265→        do {
   266→            let newRelationshipId = try await useCase.execute(trainerId: trainer.id)
   267→            relationshipId = newRelationshipId
   268→            currentTrainer = trainer
   269→            connectionStatus = .pending
   270→            showConnectionSheet = false
   271→            selectedTrainer = nil
   272→            searchResults = []
   273→            searchQuery = ""
   274→            inviteCode = ""
   275→            isRequestingConnection = false
   276→
   277→            // Register student in CMS so the trainer can assign workouts
   278→            await registerStudentInCMS(trainerId: trainer.id)
   279→
   280→            isRequestingConnection = false
   281→            return true
   282→        } catch {
   283→            self.error = error
   284→            isRequestingConnection = false
   285→            #if DEBUG
   286→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Error requesting connection: \(error)")
   287→            #endif
   288→            return false
   289→        }
   290→    }
   291→
   292→    // MARK: - CMS Student Registration
   293→
   294→    /// Registers the student in the CMS after a successful Firebase connection.
   295→    /// This is best-effort — failure does not block the connection flow.
   296→    private func registerStudentInCMS(trainerId: String) async {
   297→        guard let repo = cmsWorkoutRepository,
   298→              let authRepo = authRepository else {
   299→            #if DEBUG
   300→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] CMS registration skipped: dependencies not available")
   301→            #endif
   302→            return
   303→        }
   304→
   305→        do {
   306→            guard let user = try await authRepo.currentUser() else {
   307→                #if DEBUG
   308→                print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] CMS registration skipped: no current user")
   309→                #endif
   310→                return
   311→            }
   312→
   313→            try await repo.registerStudent(
   314→                firebaseUid: user.id,
   315→                trainerId: trainerId,
   316→                displayName: user.displayName,
   317→                email: user.email
   318→            )
   319→
   320→            #if DEBUG
   321→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Student registered in CMS for trainer \(trainerId)")
   322→            #endif
   323→        } catch {
   324→            #if DEBUG
   325→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] CMS registration failed (non-blocking): \(error)")
   326→            #endif
   327→        }
   328→    }
   329→
   330→    // MARK: - Cancel Connection
   331→
   332→    func cancelConnection() async -> Bool {
   333→        guard let useCase = cancelConnectionUseCase,
   334→              let relId = relationshipId else {
   335→            #if DEBUG
   336→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] CancelTrainerConnectionUseCase not available or no relationship")
   337→            #endif
   338→            return false
   339→        }
   340→
   341→        isLoading = true
   342→        error = nil
   343→
   344→        do {
   345→            try await useCase.execute(relationshipId: relId)
   346→            currentTrainer = nil
   347→            connectionStatus = nil
   348→            relationshipId = nil
   349→            assignedWorkouts = []
   350→            isLoading = false
   351→            return true
   352→        } catch {
   353→            self.error = error
   354→            isLoading = false
   355→            #if DEBUG
   356→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Error canceling connection: \(error)")
   357→            #endif
   358→            return false
   359→        }
   360→    }
   361→
   362→    // MARK: - Load Assigned Workouts
   363→
   364→    private func loadAssignedWorkouts() async {
   365→        // Try CMS workouts first (primary source)
   366→        if let cmsUseCase = fetchCMSWorkoutsUseCase {
   367→            do {
   368→                let result = try await cmsUseCase.execute()
   369→                assignedWorkouts = result.workouts
   370→                #if DEBUG
   371→                print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Loaded \(result.workouts.count) CMS workouts")
   372→                #endif
   373→                return
   374→            } catch {
   375→                #if DEBUG
   376→                print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] CMS workouts failed, falling back to Firebase: \(error)")
   377→                #endif
   378→            }
   379→        }
   380→
   381→        // Fallback to Firebase workouts
   382→        guard let useCase = fetchAssignedWorkoutsUseCase else {
   383→            return
   384→        }
   385→
   386→        do {
   387→            assignedWorkouts = try await useCase.execute()
   388→        } catch {
   389→            #if DEBUG
   390→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Error loading workouts: \(error)")
   391→            #endif
   392→        }
   393→    }
   394→
   395→    // MARK: - Observation
   396→
   397→    private func startObservingRelationship() {
   398→        observationTask?.cancel()
   399→        observationTask = Task {
   400→            guard let useCase = getCurrentTrainerUseCase else { return }
   401→
   402→            for await relationship in useCase.observeRelationship() {
   403→                guard !Task.isCancelled else { break }
   404→
   405→                if let rel = relationship, rel.status != .cancelled {
   406→                    connectionStatus = rel.status
   407→                    relationshipId = rel.id
   408→
   409→                    // Reload trainer if status changed to active
   410→                    if rel.status == .active && currentTrainer == nil {
   411→                        await loadCurrentTrainer()
   412→                    }
   413→                } else {
   414→                    // nil or cancelled — treat as no trainer
   415→                    currentTrainer = nil
   416→                    connectionStatus = nil
   417→                    relationshipId = nil
   418→                }
   419→            }
   420→        }
   421→    }
   422→
   423→    private func startObservingWorkouts() {
   424→        workoutsObservationTask?.cancel()
   425→        workoutsObservationTask = Task {
   426→            guard let useCase = fetchAssignedWorkoutsUseCase else { return }
   427→
   428→            for await workouts in useCase.observe() {
   429→                guard !Task.isCancelled else { break }
   430→                assignedWorkouts = workouts
   431→            }
   432→        }
   433→    }
   434→
   435→    // MARK: - UI Helpers
   436→
   437→    func selectTrainer(_ trainer: PersonalTrainer) {
   438→        selectedTrainer = trainer
   439→        showConnectionSheet = true
   440→    }
   441→
   442→    func dismissConnectionSheet() {
   443→        showConnectionSheet = false
   444→        selectedTrainer = nil
   445→    }
   446→
   447→    func clearError() {
   448→        error = nil
   449→    }
   450→
   451→    func clearSearch() {
   452→        searchQuery = ""
   453→        Task { await searchTrainers() }
   454→    }
   455→}
   456→

   329→    // MARK: - Training Profile Section
   330→
   331→    private var trainingProfileSection: some View {

   556→    private func loadProfileData() async {
   557→        // Load user name
   558→        if let cachedName = UserDefaults.standard.string(forKey: "socialUserDisplayName"), !cachedName.isEmpty {
   559→            userName = cachedName
   560→        }
   561→
   562→        // Load workout history stats
   563→        if let historyRepo = resolver.resolve(WorkoutHistoryRepository.self) {
   564→            do {
   565→                let entries = try await historyRepo.listEntries()
   566→                completedWorkouts = entries.count
   567→                totalMinutes = entries.reduce(0) { $0 + ($1.durationMinutes ?? 0) }
   568→
   569→                // Calculate streak
   570→                let calendar = Calendar.current
   571→                let today = calendar.startOfDay(for: Date())
   572→                let sortedDates = entries.map { calendar.startOfDay(for: $0.date) }.sorted(by: >)
   573→                if let mostRecent = sortedDates.first,
   574→                   let yesterday = calendar.date(byAdding: .day, value: -1, to: today),
   575→                   mostRecent >= yesterday {
   576→                    var streak = 1
   577→                    var currentDate = mostRecent
   578→                    for date in sortedDates.dropFirst() {
   579→                        let expected = calendar.date(byAdding: .day, value: -1, to: currentDate)!
   580→                        if date == expected {
   581→                            streak += 1
   582→                            currentDate = date
   583→                        } else if date == currentDate {
   584→                            continue
   585→                        } else {
   586→                            break
   587→                        }
   588→                    }
   589→                    streakDays = streak
   590→                }
   591→            } catch {
   592→                #if DEBUG
   593→                print("[Profile] Error loading history: \(error)")
   594→                #endif
   595→            }
   596→        }
   597→
   598→        if let profileRepo = resolver.resolve(UserProfileRepository.self) {
   599→            userProfile = try? await profileRepo.loadProfile()
   600→        }
   601→    }
   602→
   603→    private func loadEntitlement() async {
   604→        #if DEBUG
   605→        if DebugEntitlementOverride.shared.isEnabled {
   606→            entitlement = DebugEntitlementOverride.shared.entitlement
   607→            debugModeEnabled = true
   608→            debugIsPro = DebugEntitlementOverride.shared.isPro
   609→            return
   610→        }
   611→        #endif
   612→
   613→        if let repo = entitlementRepository {
   614→            do {
   615→                entitlement = try await repo.currentEntitlement()
   616→            } catch {
   617→                print("Failed to load entitlement: \(error)")
   618→            }
   619→        }
   620→    }

   622→    private func restorePurchases() async {
   623→        guard let repo = storeKitRepository else { return }
   624→        let restored = await repo.service.restorePurchases()
   625→        if restored {
   626→            await loadEntitlement()
   627→            restoreMessage = "settings.restore_success".localized
   628→        } else {
   629→            restoreMessage = "settings.restore_not_found".localized
   630→        }
   631→        showingRestoreAlert = true
   632→    }
   633→

   635→        if let url = URL(string: "mailto:support@fittoday.app") {
   636→            UIApplication.shared.open(url)
   637→        }
   638→    }
   639→

   641→    private func handleDebugModeChange(_ enabled: Bool) {
   642→        DebugEntitlementOverride.shared.isEnabled = enabled
   643→        if enabled {
   644→            debugIsPro = DebugEntitlementOverride.shared.isPro
   645→            handleDebugProChange(debugIsPro)
   646→        } else {
   647→            Task { await loadEntitlement() }
   648→        }
   649→    }

   653→        entitlement = DebugEntitlementOverride.shared.entitlement
   654→    }

content.text:
Now I have the full picture. The personal trainer listing is gated by:
1. **Feature flags** (`personalTrainerEnabled`) which defaults to `false` — controls visibility everywhere
2. **EntitlementPolicy** — marks `personalTrainer` as elite-only

I'll remove these restrictions so all users can see and search for trainers.

1→//
     2→//  EntitlementPolicyTests.swift
     3→//  FitTodayTests
     4→//
     5→//  Testes para a política de acesso a features.
     6→//
     7→
     8→import XCTest
     9→@testable import FitToday
    10→
    11→final class EntitlementPolicyTests: XCTestCase {
    12→
    13→    // MARK: - Pro Access Tests
    14→
    15→    func testProUserHasAccessToNonLimitedFeatures() {
    16→        let proEntitlement = ProEntitlement(isPro: true, source: .storeKit, expirationDate: nil)
    17→
    18→        let nonLimitedFeatures = ProFeature.allCases.filter { $0 != .aiWorkoutGeneration }
    19→        for feature in nonLimitedFeatures {
    20→            let result = EntitlementPolicy.canAccess(feature, entitlement: proEntitlement)
    21→            XCTAssertTrue(result.isAllowed, "Pro user should have access to \(feature)")
    22→        }
    23→    }

content.text:
Build succeeded with no errors.

Here's a summary of the changes made:

**Problem:** Personal trainer listing was restricted — only accessible when feature flag was enabled via Remote Config, and `EntitlementPolicy` marked it as elite-only.

**Changes (6 files):**

1. **`EntitlementPolicy.swift`** — Changed `personalTrainer` and `trainerWorkouts` from `.requiresElite` to `.allowed` for all tiers (free, pro, elite). Updated `isEliteOnly` to return `false`.

2. **`ProfileProView.swift`** — Removed `isPersonalTrainerEnabled` state and feature flag check. Personal trainer card now always shows in settings.

3. **`PersonalTrainerViewModel.swift`** — Always sets `isFeatureEnabled = true` instead of depending on Remote Config flag.

4. **`HomeViewModel.swift`** — Always sets `isPersonalTrainerEnabled = true` so the trainer card shows on Home for all users.

5. **`PersonalTrainerUseCases.swift`** — Removed feature flag guards from `DiscoverTrainersUseCase`, `RequestTrainerConnectionUseCase`, `CancelTrainerConnectionUseCase`, `GetCurrentTrainerUseCase`, and `observeRelationship()`.

6. **`EntitlementPolicyTests.swift`** — Updated tests to reflect that `personalTrainer`/`trainerWorkouts` are now accessible to all users, and adjusted `proOnlyFeatures` count from 7 to 5.

         }

content.text:
O diff mostra as 3 mudanças finais:
1. **EntitlementPolicy** — personalTrainer/trainerWorkouts agora `.allowed` para todos
2. **ProfileProView** — removeu o badge "PRO" e a diferenciação visual entre free/pro no card do personal trainer
3. **Tests** — atualizados para refletir que personal trainer é acessível a todos

git add FitToday/FitToday/Domain/Entities/EntitlementPolicy.swift FitToday/FitToday/Presentation/Features/Pro/ProfileProView.swift FitToday/FitTodayTests/Domain/EntitlementPolicyTests.swift && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix: allow all users to view and search personal trainers

Remove elite-only restriction from personalTrainer and trainerWorkouts
in EntitlementPolicy so free and pro users can access the trainer
listing. Remove PRO badge differentiation from the personal trainer
card in ProfileProView. Feature flag (Remote Config) still controls
overall visibility of the feature.
EOF
)"

Commit realizado na branch `fix/personal-trainer-access-all-users`. 

Resumo final:
- **EntitlementPolicy**: `personalTrainer`/`trainerWorkouts` agora `.allowed` para todos os tiers
- **ProfileProView**: Removido badge "PRO" do card — todos veem igual
- **Feature flag** (`personalTrainerEnabled`): mantida como kill switch via Remote Config — quando desabilitada, ninguém vê; quando habilitada, todos veem independente do plano
- **Testes**: atualizados

gh pr create --title "fix: allow all users to view and search personal trainers" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

#!/bin/bash
# ============================================================================
# iOS Deploy Script (xcodebuild + asc)
# Projeto: GastandoYa
#
# Comandos:
# ./deploy.sh release [--skip-tests] [--skip-build] [--ipa <path>] [--dry-run]
# ./deploy.sh build [--skip-tests]
# ./deploy.sh testflight [--skip-tests] [--skip-build] [--ipa <path>] [--dry-run]
# ./deploy.sh appstore [--skip-tests] [--skip-build] [--ipa <path>] [--dry-run]
# ============================================================================
set -euo pipefail

# Diretório do script (para carregar .env do mesmo local)
SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"

# Carrega .env ANTES dos defaults para que seus valores sejam respeitados
if [[ -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/.env" ]]; then
set -a; source "$SCRIPT_DIR/.env"; set +a
fi
if [[ -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/.env.local" ]]; then
set -a; source "$SCRIPT_DIR/.env.local"; set +a
fi

# Cores
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
NC='\033[0m'

log_info() { echo -e "${BLUE}ℹ️ $1${NC}"; }
log_success() { echo -e "${GREEN}✅ $1${NC}"; }
log_warning() { echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠️ $1${NC}"; }
log_error() { echo -e "${RED}❌ $1${NC}"; }
log_step() {
echo -e "\n${BLUE}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━${NC}"
echo -e "${GREEN}▶ $1${NC}"
echo -e "${BLUE}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━${NC}\n"
}

# ============================================================================
# CONFIG (pode sobrescrever via .env / env vars)
# ============================================================================
PROJECT_NAME="${PROJECT_NAME:-GastandoYa}"
BUNDLE_ID="${BUNDLE_ID:-com.dev.GastandoYa}"
SCHEME="${SCHEME:-GastandoYa}"
PROJECT_PATH="${PROJECT_PATH:-./GastandoYa.xcodeproj}"

CONFIGURATION="${CONFIGURATION:-Release}"

content.text:
{"id":"PRO-101","title":"🔒 FitToday: Permission Error on Personal Trainer Profile Access","description":"## Screenshot

\[Error: "You don't have permission to access this resource"\]

## Problem

User trying to view Personal Trainer profile (Renato Pecchio Gimenis) receives 403 permission error.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open FitToday app
2. Navigate to Personal Trainer section
3. Search/select "Renato Pecchio Gimenis" trainer
4. Attempt to view profile or connect
5. Error dialog appears: "You don't have permission to access this resource"

## Expected Behavior

* User should be able to view trainer profile
* "Conectar" (Connect) button should work OR show proper access message

## Actual Behavior

* Permission denied error
* User cannot view trainer info or connect

## Impact

* 🔴 Blocks personal trainer feature (PRO-90 gamification + coach features dependent)
* Users cannot discover or connect with trainers
* Critical for premium features

## Possible Causes

* Firestore permission rules blocking trainer profile access
* Backend authorization check failing
* Trainer profile not properly marked as public/accessible

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] User can view trainer profile without permission error
- [ ] "Conectar" button is functional or shows appropriate UI
- [ ] Firestore rules allow public trainer profile access
- [ ] Test with multiple trainers (not just this one)
- [ ] Verify feature works for free + premium users","priority":{"value":1,"name":"Urgent"},"estimate":{"value":5,"name":"5 Points"},"url":"https://linear.app/secondbrainclaw/issue/PRO-101/fittoday-permission-error-on-personal-trainer-profile-access","gitBranchName":"viniciuscarvalho789/pro-101-fittoday-permission-error-on-personal-trainer-profile-access","createdAt":"2026-03-13T21:50:24.987Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-13T23:10:19.997Z","archivedAt":null,"completedAt":null,"dueDate":null,"slaStartedAt":null,"slaMediumRiskAt":null,"slaHighRiskAt":null,"slaBreachesAt":null,"slaType":"all","status":"In Progress","labels":[],"attachments":[],"documents":[],"createdBy":"Vinicius Carvalho","createdById":"3e96598d-8aab-4b08-89fd-0c8b5bc79497","team":"Produto","teamId":"12b374f7-7344-4b34-b3c8-d93b81cfd529","cycleId":"dbbd0f67-9a32-405d-bbeb-733fe8cb228f"}
